front.title: IPv6 Options for Wide-Area Packet Spraying (WPS): Group-Based Multipath Load Balancing

abstract.t: This document specifies the Wide-area Packet Spraying (WPS) option, an IPv6 option that can be carried in the Destination Options header or, where required, the Hop-by-Hop Options header. The option conveys the scheduling metadata that is needed to distribute the packets of a single high-volume flow across multiple parallel wide- area paths at the granularity of packet groups, and to restore the original packet ordering at the egress boundary of a controlled domain. The mechanism provides order-preserving multipath load balancing and bandwidth aggregation for wide-area interconnection of distributed computing sites, such as wide-area interconnects between Artificial Intelligence (AI) data centers, and is intended for use within limited domains.
